name: miru
description: Miru (見る) — hybrid code search for agents. Bun, TypeScript, Takara embeddings.

interface.shortDescription: Semantic code search for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Miru adds repo-aware semantic search to Codex via MCP and guides agents away from grep-style exploration.
defaultPrompt: Find where auth is wired in this repo.
Locate similar code paths for this file and line.
Search this project by behavior instead of grep.
